data.body: RED oracle confirmed before production edits. Test contract: authoritative source is the ticket AC plus AnalyzerResult.loc and typed [code_health] config contracts. Tier: pure function unit tests for size arithmetic, registry contract tests for analyzer adaptation/provenance, and real metrics command interface tests for config context and missing-tool fallback. Preconditions are exact synthetic LOC payloads/config or a foreign Go repo with PATH emptied. Postconditions are exact counts/bounds, one structural spec per id, cap-change deregistration, preserved trend Unavailable, and no fabricated zeros/raw errno. RED run: 10 required failures for the intended missing behavior (old signature/hardcodes, absent analyzer seam/context fields, git provenance, cap-change registration, leaked FileNotFoundError); 5 pre-existing churn/default-window contracts stayed green.
